lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: Hello there. Do you have any fossils for me?

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: I'm Mary. In the tent you'll find Tray, my dog. He's quite friendly and doesn't bite. I'm here for the fossils. I'll go anywhere for fossils!

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: Well, I have some rather nice things I've found. I collect fossils, infact you might say I'm obsessed with them. Large or small, but especially the small numulites.

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: What fossils would you like to trade?

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: All done. Would you like to trade in any more fossils?

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: All done. Would you like to trade in any more fossils?

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: It looks like you don't have any fossils to trade.

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: You don't have space for that.

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: Of course, you left it here and I kept it for you.

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: What fossils would you like to trade?

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: All done. Would you like to trade in any more fossils?

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: All done. Would you like to trade in any more fossils?

lines.speaker: Fossil Collector
lines.text: It looks like you don't have any fossils to trade.
